case_title: SARKISIAN, JULIANNA K. vs. PREMIER SALONS INTERNATIONAL, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROPOSED "ORDER ON APPEAL" (JUDGEMENT) RECEIVED AND FORWARDE D TO JUDGE J. WILLIAM BEARD.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE MAILED (LABOR APPEAL) COURT TRIAL SET FOR OCT-04-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 08

JUDGE: J. WILLIAM BEARD;CLERK:ECLAVERIA;RPTR:MARILYN NORMAN 9:20AM:C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLFF'S COUNSEL, RICHARD STOTT, PRESENT AND SO WITH HIS CLIENT, JULIANA SARKISIAN. DEFT. NOT APPEARING. PLFF. JULIANA SARKISIAN SWORN. COURT ASKED COUNSEL TO PRESENT HIS CASE- THIS IS A CASE WHERE PLFF WAS TERMINATED BY THE DEFT FROM EMPLOYMENT. AMOUNT PRAYED FOR IS $15 BALANCE OF PAY AND $750 PENALTY FOR 24 DAYS DELAY OF PAYMENT. COURT RENDERED JUDGMENT FOR $15 AND $250 AS PENALTY PLUS COST. NO ATTORNEY'S FEES - LABOR CODE DOES NOT PROVIDE THIS. PLFF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF APPEAL OF THE ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SARKISIAN, JULIANNA K. AS TO DEFENDANT PREMIER SALONS INTERNATIONAL, INC. STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PREMIER SALONS INTERNATIONAL, INC. $265.00 PRINCIPAL, $131.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $396.75, SEE JUDGMENT (ENTITLED HEREIN AS "ORDER ON APPEAL") FOR DETAILS.
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $131.75 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE NOV-14-1995, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SARKISIAN, JULIANNA K.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SARKISIAN, JULIANNA K. AS TO DEFENDANT PREMIER SALONS INTERNATIONAL, INC.
